title: NIELIT Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Faculty Posts
description: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Faculty Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electronics, Computer Science Engineering can apply for the NIELIT Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here ...
